# October 2025 Incident

## Summary

An interface improvement pass was implemented without first auditing the existing page structure.

## What Went Wrong

- Recommendations were made before reading the page.
- New sections duplicated information already on the page.
- Additional cards and visual elements increased bulk but not usefulness.
- The final result needed to be rolled back.

## Lesson

For existing UI, audit-first is mandatory. A good design system can still be damaged by adding redundant UI.
